turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Good morning. I need to fix a physiotherapy session. My doctor referred me after a shoulder injury.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good morning! Of course, we can set that up. What's your name and contact number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you, Meera. Do you have the referring doctor's name, just for our records?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes, it was Dr. Sharma from Apollo. Orthopaedics.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect. Our physiotherapist Mr. Ganesh Khot is available Monday through Saturday, mornings and evenings. Any preference?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Tomorrow evening would be ideal. Around 6?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: 6 PM tomorrow is available. Booked for Meera Pillai with Mr. Ganesh Khot. You'll get a confirmation message. Anything else?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Take care and have a speedy recovery!
